attachments.fallback: How to Read and Open MBOX Files? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are looking for a method to read and open MBOX files, you can use the SysInfo MBOX File Viewer. It is a versatile tool that allows you to <https://www.sysinfotools.com/blog/open-mbox-file-on-mac/|open and read multiple MBOX files>simultaneously. It can display all mailbox folders, including your Inbox, Sent Items, and Drafts. A key feature of this tool is its ability to access and view data from even corrupted MBOX files. It also offers a full prev…
